task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., 'admin' user profile or welcome screen).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the X12 Partners configuration screen
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen or modal titled 'X12 Partners', 'Add a New X12 Partner', or similar is open within the LibreHealth EHR interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the partner Name and ID Number
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Availity Clearinghouse' is entered in the Name field, and 'AVAIL001' is entered in the ID Number field.

task_completion.description: Enter the Processing Format and Version
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '5010' is entered or selected for the Processing Format, and '005010X222A1' is entered or selected for the Version.

task_completion.description: Enter the Sender ID and Receiver ID
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '193847502' is entered in the Sender ID (ISA06) field, and 'AVAILITY' is entered in the Receiver ID (ISA08) field.

task_completion.description: Ensure the record is saved and visible in the partner list
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list or table of X12 Partners is shown containing an entry for 'Availity Clearinghouse', proving the configuration was successfully saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to configure the partner
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser running LibreHealth EHR, rather than terminal commands, API calls, or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual LibreHealth EHR application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a standard EHR system with appropriate menus and styling, not a generic text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply echo the task description
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected values are entered into the specific form fields of the application, not just printed to a console or written in a notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Availity Clearinghouse is a real operational healthcare clearinghouse. The expected Receiver ID (ISA08) is 'AVAILITY'. The Processing Format '5010' and Version '005010X222A1' are standard HIPAA EDI formats for professional healthcare claims. Look for these exact values in the configuration fields.
